data.title: CI-script-tests: validate.sh exit-2 partial-test behavior broken -> test-validate-test-batched-integration.sh 3 failures
data.description:
## Incident Overview
test-validate-test-batched-integration.sh fails with 3 assertions:
1. test_validate_exits_2_on_partial_tests: validate.sh does not exit 2 when tests are partial (pending)
2. test_validate_emits_action_required_block_on_exit_2: validate.sh does not exit 2
3. test_validate_emits_action_required_block_on_exit_2: output does not contain 'ACTION REQUIRED' block

validate.sh is expected to exit 2 and emit a structured ACTION REQUIRED block when test-batched.sh reports partial completion, but this behavior is not working.

## Expected Behavior
When validate.sh detects partial test completion, it should exit 2 and emit an ACTION REQUIRED block with resume instructions.

## Actual Behavior
validate.sh does not exit 2 or emit the expected block.

## Evidence
CI run 24319865314 (2026-04-13), Script Tests job: 8 pass, 3 fail.
